title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 1–4, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's just a little nosebleed! Everyone gets those! You haven't really been hurt at all!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: My... Iron Wall was broken through!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: pearl! stop it! There's no need to go wild over a damn nosebleed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crap! He's doing that thing he learned to do while growing up in the jungle!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: back in the jungle full of wild beasts, everytime pearl felt that he was in danger,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He has a habit of lighting a fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's his defence tactic against beasts!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you dare get close to me!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
